nasb.text: Everyone who is left in your house will come and bow down to him for a piece of silver or a loaf of bread and say, “Please assign me to one of the priest’s offices so that I may eat a piece of bread.” ’ ”

esv.text: And everyone who is left in your house shall come to implore him for a piece of silver or a loaf of bread and shall say, “Please put me in one of the priests’ places, that I may eat a morsel of bread.”’”

cnv.text: 你家中剩下的人，都要來向他下拜；求一個銀幣，一塊餅，也要說：求你容我參與祭司的職務，使我可以有點餅吃。’”

ccb.text: 那时，你家存留下来的人要在他面前下拜，乞讨银子和饼，并恳求说，请给我一个祭司的职位以便糊口！’”
